title: Christmas 3 Piece Stacking Gift Boxes Nested Santa Design
features: PERFECT GIFT ACCESSORY - These nested Christmas Gift Boxes stack into a fun Christmas Santa decoration, why put gifts under the tree when you can stack them into their ow special decoration

STYLISH FESTIVE DESIGN - This set of boxes has a really special Santa design. The top box has a Santa face with a bobble nose with a hat for a lid, the middle box comes with arms on the side and buttons, the base is designed like a Santa Suit with belt and bottom button

PREMIUM QUALITY - Made with sturdy and thick materials for great durability, ensuring your precious gifts are safe. Each box has a strong sturdy lid that fits snuggly and is not loose making the decoration very secure
EASY TO ASSEMBLE & REUSABLE - Supplied pre-built with no assembly, just need to be filled and stacked. Nested so can be easily stored and re-used
SPACE FOR LOTS OF GIFTS - Plenty of room for lots of toys. Approx measurements of each box includes: 233 x 233 x 192mm, 180 x 180 x 140mm, 140 x 140 x 120mm
description: Set of 3 stackable nested gift boxes fun In a Santa design. These stackable gift boxes are Ideal for wrapping loved ones gifts. Approx measurements of each box includes: 233 x 233 x 192mm, 180 x 180 x 140mm, 140 x 140 x 120mm
